subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This handmaiden of Thine seeketh Thy good pleasure with all lowliness, humility and contrition, supplicating unto Thee in her heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدتک هذه تسترضیک بکل عجز و ذل و انکسار مبتهله الیک فی خفیات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @humility; meekness; lowliness
